<parameter name="script">
import requests

# 获取AI市场资讯
ai_response = requests.post(
    "http://localhost:47603/rss/articles",
    json={"source": "tech", "category": "AI", "max_results": 5}
)
print("=== AI Market News ===")
print(ai_response.status_code)
print(ai_response.text[:2000] if ai_response.text else "No content")

# 获取云市场资讯
cloud_response = requests.post(
    "http://localhost:47603/rss/articles",
    json={"source": "tech", "category": "cloud", "max_results": 5}
)
print("\n=== Cloud Market News ===")
print(cloud_response.status_code)
print(cloud_response.text[:2000] if cloud_response.text else "No content")
